$comment: c53 (POSIX shipped-symbol batch): lseek/sysconf/getpid (unistd.json) + nanosleep (time.json) + gettimeofday (sys/time.json) + the _SC_PAGESIZE constant (unistd.json, per-format elf=30 / macho=29). All were S0001-undeclared in SQLite os_unix. Gated [elf,macho] (pe uses os_win, so no pe target). VALUE-CORRECT (sum 42): getpid()>0 (+8); sysconf(_SC_PAGESIZE)==getpagesize()>0 (+8, a strong per-target constant check — a wrong _SC_PAGESIZE per-format value would make sysconf return a different quantity than getpagesize); gettimeofday tv_sec>1e9 (+8); nanosleep(1us)==0 (+8); lseek(fd,5000000000,SEEK_SET)==5000000000 (+10, proving the i64 return width — a 32-bit return would truncate 5e9 to 705032704). RED-ON-DISABLE: remove any of the 5 symbols or the _SC_PAGESIZE constant -> S0001.
